title: EnterpriseBench Verifier Output
description: Standardized output contract for all checkpoint verifiers. Verifiers MUST write JSON to stdout. Fallback: exit 0 = {score: 1.0, passed: true}, exit nonzero = {score: 0.0, passed: false}.

score.description: Normalized score. 0.0 = complete failure, 1.0 = full credit. Partial credit allowed.

passed.description: Whether the checkpoint met its minimum passing threshold

evidence.description: Structured evidence supporting the score. Optional but recommended for debugging.
